PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?easternPointLabel ?westernPointLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q34640 wdt:P2093 ?easternPoint ; wdt:P2123 ?westernPoint .
  ?easternPoint rdfs:label ?easternPointLabel .
  ?westernPoint rdfs:label ?westernPointLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?easternPointLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(LANG(?westernPointLabel) = "en")
}
